← Back to Vancouver 2023
2023-05-30 Canada

Vancouver 2023

Vancouver 2023

Visiting Rachel’s Grandparents in Vancouver

Rachel and Sebastián flew to Vancouver to spend a week with Rachel’s grandparents.

Rachel and Sebastián flew bright and early from Waterloo to Vancouver
Arriving in Vancouver, Sebastián met Rachel’s grandparents for the first time

Casino

On the first day, Grandpa took us to a casino!
At the casino, Grandpa gave us each $100 and encouraged us to play. Sebastián lost pretty quickly. When Grandpa saw he was out of money, he handed him another $50 and encouraged him to keep playing. Sebastián felt terrible for losing his money and so he said “no, no. I’m ok not to play” because he didn’t want to lose more. Grandpa said “ok” and played the $50 himself!
Rachel got lucky at first, and almost doubled her money. She was quite happy to stop while she was ahead, but Grandpa continued to encourage her to keep playing. On average, we basically broke even!

Aquarium

Rachel and Sebastián went to the Vancouver aquarium.

Rachel and Sebastián went to the Vancouver aquarium
Aquarium
Aquarium
New species: Rachel
Bird section of the Aquarium

Around the City

Grandpa took us to see where Rachel used to live (in the basement of this house).

Grandpa took us to see where Rachel used to live
Nearby streets
Walking around the city

Everywhere we went, Grandpa (who had some memory loss) introduced us as his “son and daughter-in-law.” Sebastián felt very welcomed into the family!!

Out for Dinner

We went for a walk along the river with Grandpa and stopped at a restaurant for lunch.

We went for a walk along the river with Grandpa
Lunch
Lunch

Spending Time Together

Most of the time we enjoyed hanging out, talking, and spending time together.

Most of the time we enjoyed hanging out, talking, and spending time together
Finally figured out how to solve Grandma’s puzzle/game
Rachel and Grandma had a lot of fun going through old photos. This is Grandma as a child
Grandpa making fun of Rachel’s shawl
Grandma with her little dog (foreshadowing Doggie!)
Grandpa’s hearing had been going for many years; we spent the whole week shouting so he could hear us!

Overall we had a lovely time with the grandparents. Lots of wonderful memories.
